Title: Getting Started with M365 Copilot
Author: John Savill's Technical Training
Description:
A walkthrough of some good interactions to start understanding and using M365 Copilot.

Some prompts I used:

💻 Hey Copilot, help me plan my day, including summary of scheduled meetings, outstanding tasks, and important messages (email/chat) that came in overnight.

💻 Goal: Conduct a detailed research analysis on the potential to build a Justice League base on Mars. Context: The justice league are the foremost super heroes primarily protecting the people of Earth but also must consider off world threats.

💻 Create a daily news brief based on trending industry and legislative news relevant to the technology business. Prioritize news where Microsoft or our partners are mentioned.

💻 I vaguely remember someone mentioning a sluggish film about boats and how things move around the world in a meeting. Which meeting was it?

💻 I'm facing a difficult decision around 3 possible options. I want you to interview me, asking one question at a time to gather all information needed to make a recommendation. I want you to stress test my thinking and challenge my thoughts and ensure I'm not only seeing upsides. Point out downsides and also consequences.

💻 Hey Copilot, I would love your help and a consultation with you to help me figure out where I can best leverage AI in my work. As an AI expert, would you please ask me questions—one question at a time until you have enough context about my work, e.g., (my responsibilities, my OKR's and KPI's) that you would make two obvious recommendations and two non-obvious recommendations for how I could leverage AI in my work.

🔎 Looking for content on a particular topic? Search the channel. If I have something it will be there!
